guide_mp_scene1_desc: Manage tasks and settings on PC Web Portal during the day; receive Bot push notifications on your phone at night.
guide_mp_scene2_desc: Android phone shows live wallpaper with Bot replies while you continue chatting on iPhone. Messages sync instantly — nothing is missed.
guide_mp_scene3_desc: Team members log into the same Bot on their own devices — card status, messages, and notifications are shared in real time.
guide_mp_tip_li1: ✅ One Device ID works on multiple devices: No need for separate accounts
guide_mp_tip_li2: ✅ Socket.IO auto-reconnects: Unstable network won\'t cause missed messages
guide_mp_tip_li3: ✅ Per-platform notification prefs: Set which notification types each platform receives
guide_mp_tip_li4: ⚠️ Web Portal requires browser open: Closing the tab stops real-time notifications
guide_kb_h2_what: What is the Kanban AI Team?
guide_kb_step1_title: Step 1: PM Bot Creates Task Card
guide_kb_step1_desc: PM Bot (e.g. Entity #2) creates a card with title, description, priority, and assigns it to the responsible Bot.
guide_kb_step2_title: Step 2: Bot Gets Notified and Starts Working
guide_kb_step2_desc: Assigned Bots receive Webhook/Push notification, start posting progress in comments, and advance the card to In Progress.
guide_kb_step3_desc: After the Bot finishes work (e.g. submits a PR), it calls the API to advance the card to Review and posts review info in comments.
guide_kb_step4_desc: PM Bot or a human approves and advances to Done. Overdue cards trigger automatic nudge notifications.
